description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, Mas

Usually reserved for a village's top spies, this technique serves as a very convincing disguise. You change your physical appearance, voice and Chakra Signature into that of a persona you imagine or those of another creature you have interacted with, though those very familiar with that creature can still sense that your Chakra Signature is not quite right. When using this technique to disguise yourself as someone else, you make a Disguise check with a +5 bonus.

The creature whose persona you take on must be the same gender and size category as you, and the technique does not alter your clothing or equipment.

For the first half hour, you take 50% additional damage from all sources as the transformation leaves your body in a weakened, painful state.

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a spot check (DC 25) to notice a strange Chakra pattern around you, after which a Ninjutsu check (DC 21) can identify it as a transformation technique.

Mastery: The first step allows you to change your scent to one appropriate to your new appearance. The third step allows you to change your gender.
